title: Motivation Is a Scam

scenes.text: Motivation gets you started. Discipline shows up when motivation quits.
You will not feel like it most days. High performers train anyway, because the plan decides, not the mood.
Start embarrassingly small. Two minutes a day beats two hours once a month.
Discipline is a muscle. Every time you keep a promise to yourself, it grows.
scenes.label: KEEP THE PROMISE

scenes.text: Follow for the discipline nobody teaches you.

description: Motivation fades - discipline compounds. The plan decides, not the mood. Follow for daily discipline!
